name: Whitetail Golf Course
about: Whitetail Golf Course is a 9-hole public golf course located in Stevensville, Montana, set within the Lee Metcalf Wildlife Refuge. The venue offers both outdoor golfing on its scenic course and a state-of-the-art indoor golf simulator for year-round play. The facility provides a range of amenities including lessons, tournaments, leagues, and simulator rentals, creating a community hub for golfers of all skill levels. The indoor simulator allows for practice sessions and play on world-class courses regardless of weather conditions, complementing the traditional outdoor golf experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to golf with an indoor simulator, unaffected by weather
Scenic natural setting with abundant wildlife for a unique outdoor golf experience
Affordable pricing and flexible group options for both on-course and simulator play

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned on website
No bar or alcohol service mentioned

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own equipment for use with the simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or beverage service is mentioned, but no restrictions on outside items are noted. BYOB may be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: While the exact time for 18 holes isn't specified, the simulator is rented by the hour at a rate of $45 for up to 4 players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Whitetail Golf Course offers junior pricing, family season passes, and mentions a welcoming atmosphere for golfers of every skill level, including children.
